CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE

MOTION To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement & Consent Judgment
Off Calendar Dec-29-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Christopher Tuttle, Esq. 510-848-8880 of the Chanler Group for Plaintiff.
No other Appearance.

RULING - The matter is Uncontested. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF JOHN MOORE's MOTION To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement & Consent Judgment is Granted. No opposition filed and the settlement complies with the Health and Safety Code.

Order and Judgment signed. (see scanned order for details)

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Mitch Lyon, CSR# 6840, mlyon@sftc.org, Reported. (D302/AYSC)
